{{Quote|Bogey 1212 here. 9662 is dead. I have the traitor in my sights. Executing Order 66.|Bogey 1212|<ref name="R83" />}}
'''Bogey 9662''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] and member of [[Bogey Squad]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. He wore the armor of a [[Clone scout trooper/Legends|clone scout trooper]].

==Biography==
Under [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Faie/Legends|Faie]], Bogey 9662 and his [[Squad/Legends|squad]] hunted down the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] who survived the initial [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] attack. While approaching the injured [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], 9662 was killed by a tree trap, which hung and choked him. The trap was designed by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chak (Wookiee)|Chak]].

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 83|''Republic'' 83]] {{1st}}
